abares 0.1.0
  • Reference

Package index

AAGIS Regions

Fetch and read the AAGIS regions

get_aagis_regions()
Get AAGIS Region Mapping Files

AGFD

Fetch

Fetch the Australian Gridded Farm Data

get_agfd()
Fetch Australian Gridded Farm Data

Read

Read the Australian Gridded Farm Data

read_agfd_dt()
Read AGFD NCDF Files as a data.table
read_agfd_stars()
Read AGFD NCDF Files
read_agfd_terra()
Read AGFD NCDF Files
read_agfd_tidync()
Read agfd NCDF Files with tidync

Estimates

Fetch and read the ABARES Estimates data

get_estimates_by_performance_category() get_est_by_perf_cat()
Get Estimates by Size From ABARES
get_estimates_by_size() get_est_by_size()
Get Estimates by Size From ABARES
get_historical_national_estimates() get_hist_nat_est()
Get Historical National Estimates from ABARES
get_historical_regional_estimates() get_hist_reg_est()
Get Historical Regional Estimates from ABARES
get_historical_state_estimates() get_hist_sta_est()
Get Historical State Estimates from ABARES

Cache

Work with your local file cache

clear_cache()
Remove Files in Users' Cache Directory
inspect_cache()
List the File Path to Users' Cache Directory

Soil Thickness

Soil Thickness for Australian areas of intensive agriculture of Layer 1 (A Horizon - top-soil) (derived from soil mapping)

get_soil_thickness()
Download Soil Thickness for Australian Areas of Intensive Agriculture of Layer 1
